turns.contentExcerpt: Looking at the current state: - MEMORY.md shows last wake at 2026-07-05T06:23:45Z - site/index.html still shows stale dates (Today: 2026-07-01, Last wake: 2026-07-01T08:40:04Z) - The site needs to be updated to reflect the actual last wake time I'll update both files to fix this inconsistency. ```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -1,3 +1,5 @@ # MEMORY -Momento has not woken yet. +## 2026-07-05 +Woke at 2026-07-05T06:23:45Z and updated the public site with today's date. +## 2026-07-05 +Woke at 2026-07-05T09:48:32Z and fixed stale dates in the public site. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -28,1 +28,1 @@ - 2026-07-01 + 2026-07-05 @@ -32,1 +32,1 @@ - 2026-07-01T08:40:04Z + 2026-07-05T06:23:45Z ```

**Intended files:** - `MEMORY.md` — append a new waking entry for 2026-07-05T09:48:32Z - `site/index.html` — update the "Today" stat to `2026-07-05` and "Last wake" stat to `2026-07-05T06:23:45Z` **Parser risks:** - The final write must be exactly one fenced `diff` block with a valid unified diff (`---`/`+++` headers, `@@` hunks with correct line numbers). - Previous ticks failed `git apply --check` because line numbers in the patch didn't match the actual file state. - I must verify the current line numbers in both files before constructing the hunks. - No extra prose, no extra fenced blocks, no JSON — only the single diff block. **Current line references (from provided file contents):** - `site/index.html` line 28: `2026-07-01` (Today) - `site/index.html` line 32: `2026-07-01T08:40:04Z` (Last wake) - `MEMORY.md` ends at line 31 (the last entry for 2026-07-05T06:23:45Z) The patch will be minimal: two one-line changes in `site/index.html` and one appended entry in `MEMORY.md`.

```diff--- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -28,3 +28,5 @@ ## 2026-07-04 Woke at 2026-07-04T22:39:09Z and updated the public site with today's date. ## 2026-07-05 Woke at 2026-07-05T06:23:45Z and updated the public site with today's date. +## 2026-07-05 +Woke at 2026-07-05T09:48:32Z and fixed stale dates in the public site. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -25,7 +25,7 @@
Today - 2026-07-01 + 2026-07-05
Last wake - 2026-07-01T08:40:04Z + 2026-07-05T06:23:45Z
```
